bullets: Worked on real-world business datasets to perform end-to-end data analysis and visualization.
Performed data cleaning, exploratory data analysis (EDA), and built interactive dashboards to extract actionable insights.
Analyzed sales and customer datasets to identify revenue patterns, customer behavior, and category-wise performance.
Conducting data analysis and building visualizations on real-world datasets.
Developing predictive models and dashboards to support data-driven decision-making.
Collaborating with mentors on industry-oriented analytics projects.
